testcase.name: test_order_mixed_1_mixed_licence_with_product_registered

failure.message:
selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (1057, 1010). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome-headless-shell=126.0.6478.61); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: #0 0x564a4e3b66aa #1 0x564a4e0990dc #2 0x564a4e0ec6c6 #3 0x564a4e0ea516 #4 0x564a4e0e7ef7 #5 0x564a4e0e6d2c #6 0x564a4e0da40f #7 0x564a4e108872 #8 0x564a4e0d9d89 #9 0x564a4e108a3e #10 0x564a4e1275c3 #11 0x564a4e108613 #12 0x564a4e0d84f7 #13 0x564a4e0d8e4e #14 0x564a4e37c87b #15 0x564a4e380921 #16 0x564a4e36836e #17 0x564a4e381482 #18 0x564a4e34cccf #19 0x564a4e3a60a8 #20 0x564a4e3a6280 #21 0x564a4e3b57dc #22 0x7f9d1d861609 start_thread

testcase.name: test_order_pickup_1_self_pickup_registered

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: Element is not clickable. Element: //div[@data-name='orderShippingPicker']//p[contains(text(), 'Salony')]/ancestor::article
